name: Voyager — Oracle → YugabyteDB migration
postCreateCommand: bash -c 'sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock 2>/dev/null || true && sudo install -m 755 .devcontainer/scripts/yb-voyager-wrapper.sh /usr/local/bin/yb-voyager && docker-compose -f init-voyager-oracle/compose.yml pull && docker pull --platform linux/amd64 yugabytedb/yb-voyager:latest && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lerocha/chinook-database/master/ChinookDatabase/DataSources/Chinook_Oracle.sql -o init-voyager-oracle/chinook_data.sql && mkdir -p /workspaces/ybdb-vanguard/init-voyager-oracle/voyager-data && echo "✅ Oracle Voyager exercise ready"'
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-ybdb.sh 1 && sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock 2>/dev/null || true && docker-compose -f init-voyager-oracle/compose.yml up -d && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → oracle       (Oracle SQLPlus shell — allow 2-3 min for DB ready on :1521)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → yb-voyager   (Voyager migration shell)"'
